# IPOpulse — India's IPO, Stock & Market Data Hub
> Free structured data platform for Indian equity markets — IPOs, stocks, sectors, FII/DII flows, super investors, and financial education.

## About
IPOpulse (https://ipopulse.talkytools.com) is a comprehensive financial data platform for Indian retail investors. It covers IPOs, stock research, market data, and financial education — structured in tables and dashboards, not blogs.

## Key Sections

### IPO Hub
- Live, upcoming, closed, and listed IPOs across NSE/BSE mainboard and SME segments
- GMP (Grey Market Premium) tracker and accuracy scorecard
- Allotment status checker (multi-registrar: KFintech, Linkintime, Bigshare)
- DRHP AI search and IPO process guide

### Stock Research
- 2,300+ companies with daily EOD prices from NSE bhavcopy
- Stock screener with sector, market cap, 52W high/low, and fundamental filters
- Company ticker pages with P/E, ROE, D/E, market cap, description, and 1Y price chart
- Stock comparison tool (side-by-side fundamental comparison of any two companies)

### Market Data
- 134 Nifty indices with daily close, P/E, P/B, and dividend yield
- FII/DII daily flows (30-day history from NSE provisional data)
- Sector performance and sector-wise momentum
- Super investor portfolios (27 tracked investors, Dec 2025 BSE/NSE quarterly filings)
- Market holidays, F&O expiry calendar, economic calendar

### Financial Education
- 35+ articles on IPO, investing, and market concepts (Indian context)
- A–Z financial glossary (90+ terms)
- IPO process step-by-step guide

### Financial Tools
- 20+ calculators: SIP, EMI, capital gains tax, income tax, LRS/TCS, USD returns
- Broker comparison (Zerodha, Groww, Upstox, Angel One, Dhan, ICICI Direct)
- Credit card comparison (top 6 Indian cards with feature matrix)
- REIT, SGB, and NCD trackers

## Data Sources
- NSE bhavcopy archives (daily EOD prices)
- NSE FII/DII provisional data
- NSE index close files (134 indices, P/E, P/B, dividend yield)
- BSE/NSE quarterly shareholding disclosures (super investor data)
- AMFI NAV data (mutual fund NAVs)
- Curated fundamentals: P/E, ROE, market cap for top 200 Indian companies

## Contact
Website: https://ipopulse.talkytools.com
Admin: admin@ipopulse.in
Not investment advice. Data sourced from BSE, NSE, SEBI, NSDL, AMFI.
